# Commit Message Template

Short (50 chars or less) summary of changes

More detailed explanatory text, if necessary. Wrap it to 72 characters. The body of the commit message should explain what and why, not how.

- Bullet points for important details or breaking changes
- Reference issues and PRs when relevant (e.g., Fixes #123)

Footer (optional):
Co-authored-by: name <name@example.com>
